title: [trustless://interop.landscape] Fireside Chat - Trustlessness, Interop, and Ethereum’s Future
description:
A conversation between Marissa Posner and Ethereum Foundation Co-Executive Director Tomasz about the future of Ethereum, trustlessness, and cross-rollup interoperability.

Talk given during day 2 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
